provenance.measurement_patch: T9a local closed gauge, colored Hessian probing, and reusable closed linearization
provenance.basis: periodic cubic B-spline longitudinal geometry and exact modes through mpol
provenance.hardware_class: local CPU: Apple M3 Max, macOS 14.4.1

t9a_structured_factor.closed_stream_gauge: fix theta=0, axial-coefficient=0 on each radial surface; restore the weighted mean only for output
t9a_structured_factor.retained_structure: neighboring radial cells, exact periodic cubic-spline support overlap, full represented poloidal coupling, and local radius-lambda cross blocks

finite_current_racetrack_smoke.case: rotating elliptical 16-control racetrack at finite toroidal current
finite_current_racetrack_smoke.status: converged research smoke; not promoted because strong force, staged continuation, and refinement gates remain

assessment: T9a is complete. The scalable closed factor passes exactness, resource, probe-count, and circular residual gates. The final racetrack state now converges efficiently and has nonzero transform, but its strong force is not acceptable evidence for T9b; staged shape/current continuation and refinement remain required.
